subject: [PATCH 3/5] fuse: implement file attributes mask for statx

reviews.author: Darrick Wong
reviews.summary: Reviewer Darrick Wong noted that the patch needs to use |= to avoid overwriting any existing vfs attributes stored in stat, and acknowledged Joanne's good catch.

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch modifies the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) implementation to include a file attributes mask for the statx system call, which allows for more fine-grained control over the information returned when querying file attributes.
